title: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 211info
text: INFINITE HEALING SOLUTIONS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient behavioral health treatment and therapy. Telehealth appointments available. 222 NW 7th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 324-0873 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 324-0873 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP Pacific Source, sliding scale, and self-pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
